title: Defer unsafe signal-handler work through a bounded notifier
prompt: The notifier currently invokes its user callback directly from the POSIX signal handler. Repair it so that the handler performs only async-signal-safe work and callback delivery happens in notifier_wait(). Preserve the API contract: signals pending before one dispatch are coalesced into one callback, the handler preserves errno, the notification path is bounded and never blocks in the handler, finite waits retain their original deadline across EINTR, and notifier_shutdown() wakes a blocked waiter without delivering a callback. Keep the single-active-notifier rule. Do not modify the tests.
